message:
fix(pipelines): fix multiple bugs in pipeline execution engine

- Fix executeParallel infinite loop when step is falsy (increment index before checking)
- Fix executeScript useless ternary (only substitute vars in inline scripts, not paths)
- Fix executeScript timeout leak (clear timeout on completion)
- Fix executeAgentTask premature termination (keep agent alive when waitForCompletion=false)
- Fix pauseRun to actually pause (abort execution, resume from checkpoint)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
